subject: New Request: Go Developer
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the telecom/media sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a architect Go Developer with strong experience in Go. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:
• Go
• AWS
• Kubernetes
• PostgreSQL
• RabbitMQ

Details:
Client: FlexTel
Start: 2025-12-15
Duration: TBD
Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
Rate: up to 1300 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Viktor Olsson
Tech Recruitment Lead
ByteForce
Tel: +46 76 677 89 01
